prompts.title: Example Action Prompts
prompts.subtitle: Practical tasks to move your empty nest syndrome forward
items: Schedule a weekly coffee date or phone call with a close friend or family member
Create a memory box or photo album celebrating your child\
Write a letter to your future self describing your hopes and concerns about this new chapter
Join a support group or online community for parents experiencing empty nest syndrome
Practice one new stress-reduction technique daily for the next two weeks
Set up a dedicated space in your home that reflects your personal interests and goals
